title: Bow Birthday Party Decoration, Black Bow Decorations with Happy Birthday Banner Glitter, Black White Balloons, Hair Clips, CakeTopper, Sash, Coquette Party Deco Set for Women Girls Princess
features: Black Bow Birthday Party Decorations: 35 10-inch latex balloons (black*10, white*10, black (printed)*5, white (printed)*5, transparent (printed)*5), black glitter Happy Birthday banner, bow banner, black and white round piece banner, paper tassels (black and white), love foil balloons*2, bow hair clips , sash, cake topper, black ribbon (1cm wide), ribbon, glue, exquisite design and elegant appearance can meet your various party decoration needs.

Charming Black Birthday Decoration Design: All black birthday party decorations include bow theme elements. It adopts an elegant black bow-style design, with black bow banners of various shapes, cake topper and balloons with bow elements, and black heart-shaped aluminum film balloons. Its stylish design will bring a touch of fashion and sweetness to your party.

Bow Birthday Decorations: Our black letters, bow banners, round piece banners and cake topper are made of good quality paper, beautifully printed and reusable. The "Happy Birthday" banner and cake topper are made of shiny cardboard, making your party more shiny and eye-catching. The balloons are made of natural latex, with a thicker texture, and come with straps and hair clips to make you more dazzling in the party.

Easy Assembly: Creating balloon magic has never been easier! The bow theme party decorations set includes glue dots, ribbons, and installation instructions to easily set up the balloon strings. The black ribbon can be made into a bow. The banners, balloons, and bow ribbons can be hung on walls, windows, or any indoor or outdoor space you like.

Versatile Decorations: Bow party decorations are suitable for various events and occasions, such as bow party decorations, princess theme parties, bridal showers, and can be used as girls or women's 16, 18, 21, 30, 40, 50, 60th birthday party decorations. They can also be used as photo props to create a beautiful background to capture precious memories with family, children, and friends.
description: From the brand Previous page FANTSPATI has focused on using balloons to create unforgettable decorative art. We believe that every celebration and every event deserves a unique aesthetic expression. Therefore, we continue to explore new themes, integrating creativity and fashion, so that balloons are no longer just decorations, but a medium that carries stories and emotions. "Let balloons decorate every moment of your heart!" BIRTHDAY PARTY DECORATIONS GIFTS FOR KIDS Next page
